---
name: "\U0001F680 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new rule, output format, or feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case
Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

### If suggesting a new rule:
- **Rule ID**: (e.g., R46, D41, J31, Q36)
- **Category**: (SEC/SAS/SCA/DST/DEP/GOV/JEN/DOC/PQL)
- **Severity**: (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)
- **Description**: (short, < 60 chars)
- **Why**: (real-world impact)
- **Detection regex**: (if you have one)
- **File types**: (GitLab CI / GitHub Actions / Jenkinsfile / Dockerfile)

### If suggesting other feature:
Describe your proposed solution.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Additional Context
Examples, screenshots, links to related tools or standards.
